channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hochul's Unwise Campaign Against Data Centers
item.description: The New York governor's moratorium gives in to anti-technology sentiment and alarmism.

item.title: The Myth of European Prosperity
item.description: A global wealth report is being misinterpreted by left-leaning American pundits.

item.title: To Win the Moon, Divide the Labor
item.description: Space dominance requires more than just financial investment.

item.title: Every Day’s a Full Moon at the Smithsonian’s American History Museum
item.description: Virtue-signaling, mediocrity, and woke ideology have degraded the Smithsonian, making a thorough overhaul necessary.
